_comment: Shipped preset for the Qwen3 4B local LLM. Sourced from ComfyUI's bundled llm_qwen3_text_gen template (GUI graph). Drives Text Stage; reused by Storyboard Stage with its own preset that flips use_default_template off. Read ONCE on first DB row creation.
label: Local Qwen3 4B
description: Qwen3 4B native LLM (ComfyUI built-in TextGenerate). Outputs a single string. Requires qwen_3_4b.safetensors in models/text_encoders/ — see workflows/text/README.md.
